violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (mozzarella cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Deli meats and meatballs were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

At the time of inspection, pizza was observed held out of temperature using Time as a Public Health Control without RIDOH CFP Approval. Inspector provided PIC with application. PIC informed to cease process until written approval is granted from RIDOH CFP. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Brownies and cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025
The cold water knob on restroom hand sink was in poor repair and not operable at the time of inspection. Hand sinks must be maintained in good working condition New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

At the time of inspection, the Certified Food Safety Manager License was observed to be expired. (Per the PIC, the food safety certificate had just expired as well.) PIC is to complete Food Safety Course and submit application for RIDOH CFP Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

At the time of inspection, previously prepped food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

At the time of inspection, pizza was observed held out of temperature using Time as a Public Health Control without RIDOH CFP Approval (Records were observed to be maintained properly.). PIC was made aware of request to be submitted to RIDOH CFP Supervisor for use of Time as a Public Health Control for the Pizza slices. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of refrigeration equipment (Internal surfaces) were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-FOOD-CONTACT SURFACES of EQUIPMENT shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to preclude accumulation of soil residues. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered (dumpster is too close to the fence to lift and shut lids). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
